testcase.name: test_list_plans_returns_plans
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter153_phase3_4_plan_management.py:47: in admin_session assert r.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration. Please use the Platform Admin login portal."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
